commit_message:
Improved ghdl Makefile Improved ghdl Makefile The `Makefile` now has four targets for `ghdl` based development workflows: 
- `synthesis`
- `elaborate`
- `run`
- `clean`

The `run` target uses the test bench which fails:
```
ghdl -r -v -fsynopsys -frelaxed-rules -Wl,-Wl,--gc-sections -fexplicit --ieee=synopsys --syn-binding --vital-checks --std=93 -frelaxed tb_ntru_prime_top \
	--vcd=tb_ntru_prime_top.vcd --wave=tb_ntru_prime_top.ghw
./tb_ntru_prime_top --vcd=tb_ntru_prime_top.vcd --wav

examples.commit_message:
Improved ghdl Makefile Improved ghdl Makefile The `Makefile` now has four targets for `ghdl` based development workflows: 
- `synthesis`
- `elaborate`
- `run`
- `clean`

The `run` target uses the test bench which fails:
```
ghdl -r -v -fsynopsys -frelaxed-rules -Wl,-Wl,--gc-sections -fexplicit --ieee=synopsys --syn-binding --vital-checks --std=93 -frelaxed tb_ntru_prime_top \
	--vcd=tb_ntru_prime_top.vcd --wave=tb_ntru_prime_top.ghw
./tb_ntru_prime_top --vcd=tb_ntru_prime_top.vcd --wav

Improved ghdl Makefile Improved ghdl Makefile The `Makefile` now has four targets for `ghdl` based development workflows: 
- `synthesis`
- `elaborate`
- `run`
- `clean`

The `run` target uses the test bench which fails:
```
ghdl -r -v -fsynopsys -frelaxed-rules -Wl,-Wl,--gc-sections -fexplicit --ieee=synopsys --syn-binding --vital-checks --std=93 -frelaxed tb_ntru_prime_top \
	--vcd=tb_ntru_prime_top.vcd --wave=tb_ntru_prime_top.ghw
./tb_ntru_prime_top --vcd=tb_ntru_prime_top.vcd --wav
```
